about.title: About Kuma
about.kuroDescription: SDM primer batch design tool with Tm-guided overlap extension.
about.mameSummary: Desktop verdict analysis tool for NB-plate mutagenesis runs.
about.mameBuiltWith: Built with Tauri + React + Python sidecar.
about.licenseText: Internal use, KRIBB C1 Lab - DOI/citation forthcoming
about.thirdPartyLicensesDesc: Open-source components bundled with this application.
about.licensesNotBundled: Third-party licenses available in distribution package.
about.mameNoExternalServices: MAME does not use external network services. All analysis runs locally.
about.diagnosticsNote: Saves a JSON bundle (app info + crash log) to a location you choose. No user data or sequences are included.

settings.title: Settings
settings.colorblindModeDesc: Adds shape markers to status indicators so colors are not the only differentiator.
settings.notificationsNote: Fired for jobs lasting longer than 5 minutes.
settings.sleepPrevention: Sleep prevention: enabled while jobs run.

network.offlineModeHint: When enabled, all external network calls (UniProt, BLAST, AlphaFold, InterPro) are blocked.

sidecar.cancelTimeoutHint: Seconds to wait for a graceful cancel before force-killing the sidecar (5–120 s).

telemetry.crashLogHint: Automatically send anonymized crash reports to help improve stability. Default: off.
telemetry.anonymousStatsHint: Share anonymous feature usage data. No personal or sequence data is included. Default: off.

nativeBarcodeDialog.title: Multiple native barcodes detected
nativeBarcodeDialog.description: This run contains more than one MinKNOW native barcode. Select which barcodes to demultiplex; each selected barcode is processed into its own output folder.

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.subtitle: Thresholds and ingest mode for this batch.
parameters.targetAmpliconLengthHelp: Expected amplicon length after barcode sorting. Leave blank to auto-detect from sample reads; set manually when the distribution is noisy.
parameters.targetAmpliconLengthAriaLabel: Target amplicon length in bp; leave blank to auto-detect
parameters.lengthToleranceHelp: Allowed window around target amplicon length. Reads outside target ± tolerance are filtered when length filtering is active.
parameters.minQscoreHelp: Minimum per-read qscore threshold when sequencing_summary metadata is available.
parameters.normalizeHeadersHelp: Writes the well name into FASTA headers instead of preserving ONT read IDs. This makes downstream per-well parsing more consistent.
parameters.rawRunOptionsAriaLabel: Raw run demux and filter options
parameters.barcodeRunsAutomatically: Barcode sorting runs automatically when you press the main Run button.
parameters.cdsStartHelp: 0-based CDS start offset used when translating consensus sequence to amino acids. If the reference file has CDS annotations, select a detected candidate.
parameters.cdsEndHelp: CDS end coordinate used for translation. Must match the reference sequence frame.
parameters.manyCutoff: Max unexpected AA changes per well
parameters.manyCutoffHelp: Wells with more amino-acid changes than this threshold are flagged as MANY (low-confidence, unpickable).
parameters.maxConsensusNFractionHelp: Maximum fraction of ambiguous N bases tolerated in a well consensus before it is rejected (0.0 to 1.0). Default 0.0 rejects any consensus containing an N; higher values allow more ambiguity.
parameters.bimodalTooltip: Distribution looks bimodal. Recommended uses knee detection.
parameters.normalizeHeadersAriaLabel: Write well name as FASTA header instead of ONT read ID
parameters.legacyKbCutoffAriaLabel: Legacy min file size KB cutoff (proxy for read depth)
parameters.autoDetectedAriaLabel: Auto-detected amplicon length: {{length}} bp, confidence {{confidence}}, sampled {{reads}} reads
parameters.modeAmpliconTitle: Linear PCR amplicon target. Reads cover a single defined region; consensus called per barcode within that region.
parameters.modePlasmidTitle: Circular plasmid target. Reads can wrap the origin; consensus accounts for full plasmid topology.
parameters.ingestBarcodeTitle: Group reads by Nanopore barcode (NB01, NB02, ...). Each barcode bin becomes one sample.
parameters.ingestAmpliconTitle: Group reads by amplicon identity. Use when multiple amplicons share a barcode or when demultiplexing by sequence match.
parameters.inputModeConsensusTitle: Start from pre-computed consensus FASTA (one sequence per barcode). Skips sorting and consensus calling.
parameters.inputModeSortedBarcodeTitle: Start from already-sorted barcode directories (fastq.gz per barcode). Skips MinKNOW sorting; runs consensus calling.
parameters.inputModeRawRunTitle: Start from a raw MinKNOW run folder (fastq_pass/ + run metadata). Full pipeline: sort barcodes, filter, then consensus.
parameters.minFilteredDepthHelp: Cutoff based on read count passing the length-window filter. This is the primary depth-based quality cutoff.
parameters.minFilteredDepthAria: Min filtered depth (reads). Length-window-filtered read count cutoff.
parameters.minFilteredDepthTitle: Primary depth cutoff. Based on reads passing the length-window filter.
parameters.minFilteredDepthFootnote: Length-window-filtered read count. ONT R10.4.1 consensus: Q35+ ~15x. Does not convert 1:1 with legacy KB cutoff.
parameters.legacyKbHelp: Legacy cutoff using FASTA file size as a proxy for read depth. Affected by compression ratio, length distribution, and library variation.
parameters.legacyKbTooltip: File-size-based proxy cutoff. Affected by compression ratio, length distribution, and library variation. Use as reference only.
parameters.modeHelp: Analysis mode: amplicon (linear PCR product) or plasmid (circular). Choose plasmid for whole-vector consensus.
parameters.ingestHelp: Ingest layout: barcode (per-well demultiplexed) or amplicon (single bulk read set).
parameters.inputSourceHelp: Input source: consensus (pre-called), sorted_barcode (per-well FASTQ), or raw_run (MinKNOW run folder).
parameters.legacyOptionsDeprecationWarning: These options are deprecated and will be removed in a future version. Prefer Min Filtered Depth.

tooltips.flankMin: Outer range (nt) for primer start position relative to gene boundary
tooltips.flankMax: Outer range (nt) for primer start position relative to gene boundary
tooltips.bindingMinLen: Primer length range (nt) explored during candidate enumeration
tooltips.bindingMaxLen: Primer length range (nt) explored during candidate enumeration
tooltips.tmMin: Acceptable melting temperature range (degree C) for primer binding region
tooltips.tmMax: Acceptable melting temperature range (degree C) for primer binding region

parameters.coverageFractionHelp: Minimum fraction of the reference sequence that must be covered by each alignment hit (0.5 to 1.0). Higher values require more complete alignments.
parameters.coverageFractionAriaLabel: Minimum coverage fraction for alignment hits
parameters.editDistRatioHelp: Maximum edit distance as a fraction of the barcode prefix length (0.0 to 0.5). Lower values require stricter barcode matches.
parameters.editDistRatioAriaLabel: Maximum edit distance ratio for barcode matching
parameters.chimeraSplitHelp: When enabled, all alignment hits per read are evaluated to detect chimeric reads that span multiple wells. Recommended to leave on.
parameters.chimeraSplitAriaLabel: Enable chimera detection by evaluating all alignment hits per read
parameters.ampliconConfidenceHelp: Confidence of the amplicon length auto-detected from sampled reads: peak read-length bin share at or above 30% is high, at or above 15% is medium, otherwise low.

barcodeSetup.title: Barcode Package Setup
barcodeSetup.subtitle: Generate a MAME barcode package from a CDS FASTA and barcode seed file.
barcodeSetup.outputLocationHelper: Folder where the barcode package files are written. Leave empty to use the project's design/ folder.
barcodeSetup.cdsFastaHelper: Reference CDS sequence (FASTA, GenBank, or SnapGene .dna). gene_start / gene_end are 0-based indices into this sequence.
barcodeSetup.toastSuccessDescWithLength: Amplicon length: {{length}} bp. Files saved to {{dir}}/
barcodeSetup.overwriteConfirmDir: The {{dir}}/ folder already exists and will be overwritten (primer CSV, barcode XLSX, amplicon FASTA). Do you want to continue?
barcodeSetup.geneEndError: gene_end must be greater than gene_start.
barcodeSetup.noProjectWarning: A project must be open to generate a package. Select Open Project from the File menu.
barcodeSetup.barcodeSeedsXlsxHelper: xlsx file containing fwd_1..12 and rev_1..8 seed sequences.
barcodeSetup.polymeraseQ5Title: NEB Q5 High-Fidelity. Tm preset ~72 °C, low Mg²⁺. Default choice for high-fidelity amplification.
barcodeSetup.polymeraseTaqTitle: Standard Taq polymerase. Tm preset ~60 °C, higher Mg²⁺. Use for routine PCR or when 3'A overhangs are desired.
barcodeSetup.polymerasePhusionTitle: Thermo Phusion High-Fidelity. Tm preset ~72 °C, blunt-end, fast extension.
barcodeSetup.polymeraseKODTitle: Toyobo KOD One / KOD Hot Start. Tm preset ~68 °C with Mg²⁺/dNTP correction. High-fidelity, fast.
barcodeSetup.cdsCandidateNoneDetected: No CDS detected. Enter coordinates manually.
barcodeSetup.cdsCandidateHelp: CDS candidate auto-detected from the FASTA. Coordinates apply on selection.
barcodeSetup.geneNameHelp: Short gene identifier used in output filenames and labels (e.g. egfp).
barcodeSetup.polymeraseHelp: Polymerase profile used to set default Tm/binding constraints. Q5 recommended for high-fidelity PCR.
barcodeSetup.flankMinHelp: Minimum flank length (nt) around CDS for barcode primer search. Default 100.
barcodeSetup.flankMaxHelp: Maximum flank length (nt). Larger windows give more primer candidates but slow search.
barcodeSetup.bindingMinLenHelp: Minimum primer binding length (nt). Typical 18-22 for stable PCR priming.
barcodeSetup.bindingMaxLenHelp: Maximum primer binding length (nt). Above 35 increases secondary structure risk.

ingest.contextSubtitle: Ingest measurements, merge replicates, and export the EVOLVEpro input for this round.
ingest.uploadDesc: Load a long-format CSV / Excel file (well, replicate, value columns) into the current round.

wtWells.title: WT wells (normalization reference)
wtWells.helpText: Wells marked here serve as the wild-type baseline for activity fold-change normalization.

mergeExport.contextSubtitle: Merge genotype with activity and export EVOLVEpro input.
mergeExport.drawerRightDesc: Return to KURO for next round
mergeExport.inspectorBridgeDesc: Merged table flows back to KURO as EVOLVEpro input for the next design round.
mergeExport.openJanusExportAriaLabel: Open JANUS cell-stock mapping export dialog

export.desc: Save the merged table as an EVOLVEpro training input xlsx (strict 2-column [Variant, Activity] format, short variant notation such as F89W → 89W).
export.heading: Export EVOLVEpro xlsx

exportBlocked.body: Compare with the previous round's EVOLVEpro result and verify the label mapping for variants that share an Activity value.
exportBlocked.title: Export blocked — label-swap detected

merge.btnEvolveproAria: Run v0.3 RPC: replicate merge + label-swap guard
merge.desc: Join uploaded activity with the round genotype and normalise by WT.
merge.heading: Merge activity with genotype

activity.subtitle: Enter this phase once wet-lab activity measurements are ready (typically days to weeks after Phase 1 Barcode Setup and Phase 2 Analyze). Load measurements, merge with genotype, then export the EVOLVEpro training input.
activity.title: Activity data

buildEvolvepro.title: Build EVOLVEpro Input
buildEvolvepro.subtitle: Combine the plate layout, the raw round-1 GC-FID report, and the variant-labeled re-measure report into one EVOLVEpro input xlsx.
buildEvolvepro.layoutXlsxHelper: Mutant to well position mapping (Mutant, Well Pos. columns).
buildEvolvepro.gcDataXlsxHelper: Pre-normalised relative activity per well (Sample Name, Area columns).
buildEvolvepro.repBatchXlsxHelper: FID1B block report with numeric base IDs and replicate suffixes.
buildEvolvepro.prevEvolveproXlsxHelper: Previous-round EVOLVEpro file used as the rank source (Variant, activity).
buildEvolvepro.round1ReportXlsxHelper: Raw Agilent FID1B report; sample names are well positions (A1..H12), with WT_n blocks.
buildEvolvepro.remeasureReportXlsxHelper: Raw Agilent FID1B report; sample names are variant labels (e.g. V5F or 5F), repeated rows are replicates.
buildEvolvepro.outputXlsxHelper: Destination file for the merged EVOLVEpro input.
buildEvolvepro.emptyState: Select the three input files and an output path, then build the EVOLVEpro input.
buildEvolvepro.prevDescendingWarn: The previous EVOLVEpro file is not in descending activity order. Review the mapping audit before trusting the ranks.
buildEvolvepro.mismatchedHint: Candidates whose 3-replicate confirmation mean differs notably from the 1-replicate primary screen value.
buildEvolvepro.verdictXlsxHelper: Optional Analyze Excel report (Final sheet: well_id + verdict). Variants whose well is not PASS are excluded. Omit to skip NGS gating.
buildEvolvepro.round1SourcePrevHelper: Use a prior EVOLVEpro file (Variant, activity) as the full round-1 baseline.
buildEvolvepro.round1SourceRawHelper: Use a raw GC-FID report (well-named); the plate layout maps wells to variants.
buildEvolvepro.round1EvolveproXlsxHelper: Previous-round EVOLVEpro xlsx (Variant, activity). Re-measured variants are replaced by their means.
buildEvolvepro.layoutXlsxOptionalHelper: Optional. Only used to map variant to well for NGS verdict gating.

runHealth.noMinKnow: MinKNOW raw run directory not detected. Pore yield, throughput, and barcode charts are unavailable.
runHealth.figureVerdictBreakdownCaption: Stacked bar showing PASS, Ambiguous, Fail, and Fallback counts per plate.
runHealth.figureFileSizeCaptionBase: 7-bucket file size histogram. Suggested cutoff at {{cutoffKb}} KB using {{method}} method.
runHealth.figureFileSizeCaptionBimodal: 7-bucket file size histogram. Suggested cutoff at {{cutoffKb}} KB using {{method}} method. Bimodal distribution detected.
runHealth.fileSizeAriaLabel: File size distribution histogram. Suggested cutoff: {{cutoffKb}} KB ({{method}})
runHealth.fileSizeAriaLabelBimodal: File size distribution histogram. Suggested cutoff: {{cutoffKb}} KB ({{method}}), bimodal distribution detected
runHealth.figureBarcodeCaption: Horizontal bar chart showing read counts for each detected barcode.
runHealth.figureThroughputCaption: Line chart showing reads per second from experiment start to {{maxTime}} hours.
runHealth.classCountTableCaption: Verdict class counts across all plates
runHealth.neighborAvgHelp: Mean read count of the four orthogonal neighbor wells (up/down/left/right). Informational; not used in the z-score.
runHealth.zScoreHelp: (well reads minus plate mean) / plate SD. Wells above 2.5 are flagged. Severity: above 4 high, above 3 medium, above 2.5 low.
runHealth.percentileHelp: File-size percentiles in KB by linear interpolation: p05 is the 5th percentile through p95 the 95th.
runHealth.methodHelp: How the cutoff was chosen: median minus 2 sigma (broad unimodal), p05 (tight unimodal), kneedle (elbow of a bimodal distribution), or a 50 KB floor when no method clears 50 KB.

verdictTable.emptyDesc: Run analysis to populate the verdict table.
verdictTable.noMatchDesc: No results match the current search or filter.

evolveproExport.includedTitle: Will be included in EVOLVEpro export.
evolveproExport.reasonNoLog2fc: Excluded — log₂FC could not be computed.

activity.log2fcHelp: Log2 of fold-change (well activity mean / plate WT-well average). 0 is WT level; +1 is 2x WT.
activity.foldChangeHelp: Activity mean divided by the plate WT-well average (linear fold-change).
activity.rawMeanHelp: Mean and SD of the raw activity signal across replicate measurements of this well (SD shown when 2 or more replicates).
activity.replicatesHelp: Number of activity measurements (replicate wells) aggregated for this mutant.
activity.ngsHelp: Sequencing genotype check: pass when the called mutation equals the expected design, fail otherwise.

verdictTable.recoveredHelp: A mutant is recovered when at least one of its replicate wells (across all plates) is PASS or AMBIGUOUS.

summaryRow.successRateHelp: Share of designed mutants with at least one PASS replicate. WT controls and UNKNOWN_* groups are excluded. AMBIGUOUS does not count here (unlike Recovered).

menuBar.restartSidecarConfirm: Analysis is running. Restart sidecar anyway?
menuBar.exportWorkspaceZipSoon: Export workspace as zip - coming soon

appLayout.deadlockDescription: No progress update for {{seconds}}+ seconds. The job is stuck.
appLayout.activityTabTitle: Activity Data — EVOLVEpro input conversion (step ④ of PI workflow)
appLayout.analyzeTabTitle: Sequencing QC — part of NGS Validation (step ② of PI workflow)
appLayout.barcodeSetupTabTitle: Run Setup — part of NGS Validation (step ② of PI workflow)

export.title: Export Results
export.descriptionBase: Save the complete verdict set as an Excel workbook.
export.openFolderAriaLabel: Open export folder in file explorer

janusMapping.title: Export Janus Mapping
janusMapping.description: Export the final cell-stock Janus mapping file (K4 spec) as CSV or XLSX.
janusMapping.outputPathAriaLabel: Output file path for Janus mapping
janusMapping.browseAriaLabel: Browse save path for Janus mapping
janusMapping.columnsNote: Columns: well, custom_barcode, variant, verdict, and plate coordinates.
janusMapping.phase1Note: Phase 1: only passed wells are included.

runReport.title: Export Run Report
runReport.description: Export a one-page run summary report as HTML or PDF.
runReport.outputPathAriaLabel: Output file path for run report
runReport.browseAriaLabel: Browse save path for run report
runReport.pdfNote: PDF export requires weasyprint. If not installed, the report is saved as HTML.
runReport.fallbackNotice: weasyprint not found — report was saved as HTML instead.

inputPanel.title: Input files
inputPanel.subtitle: Primary run inputs and output location.
inputPanel.redetectAriaLabel: Re-detect input files from project directory

consensus.label: Consensus FASTA folder
consensus.helperText: Folder with pre-sorted per-well FASTA files (consensus mode)

sorted_barcode.label: Sorted barcode folder
sorted_barcode.placeholder: Folder containing sorted barcode FASTA files
sorted_barcode.helperText: Folder with sorted barcode FASTA outputs from demux

kuroXlsx.label: KURO xlsx
kuroXlsx.helpText: The expected_mutations .xlsx file exported from KURO. MAME compares the expected mutations in this file against NGS consensus results.

referenceFasta.label: Reference sequence
referenceFasta.helperText: Reference nucleotide (CDS) sequence used for variant calling against consensus
referenceFasta.helpText: Reference sequence used as the baseline for variant calling. FASTA, GenBank, and SnapGene files are supported. Using the same reference as KURO design is recommended. It must be a nucleotide (DNA/CDS) sequence used for read alignment, not a protein sequence.

customBarcodes.label: Custom Barcodes (xlsx or csv)
customBarcodes.helperText: Combinatorial barcode definition used before analysis
customBarcodes.helpText: Raw MinKNOW run mode uses this file to assign reads to per-well FASTA outputs before analysis.

sampleMap.label: Sample Map (optional)
sampleMap.helperText: Well-to-sample name mapping — adds mutant name to sorted FASTA filenames (e.g. A01_V5F_F1_R1.fasta)
sampleMap.helpText: Col A: sample name, Col B: well position (e.g. A1). Compatible with KURO mutants.xlsx layout.

exportDest.label: Export destination folder
exportDest.placeholder: Choose a folder; {{filename}} will be created
exportDest.helperText: Analysis report will use a KURO-style rule-based .xlsx filename
exportDest.helpText: Folder where the analysis result Excel will be saved. The filename is auto-generated using KURO-style rules combining date, reference/input tokens, MAME target, and result count tokens.

buildWellLayout.ariaLabel: Auto-generate well layout from expected_mutations xlsx

files.contextSubtitle: Select a MinKNOW run folder and confirm detected files.

design.contextSubtitle: Map KURO barcode package to this run.

inputs.contextSubtitle: Configure thresholds and run quality control.

plate.clusterAlertDesc: {{wells}} — adjacent wells failed simultaneously. This may indicate a pipetting issue.

review.contextSubtitle: Verdict table, plate map, and per-plate verdict distribution in one view.
review.inspectorSubtitle: Shows well details when a well is selected, otherwise verdict summary

janusDeck.deckImageAriaLabel: JANUS deck slot positions: top row tip flush, source plates P1 P2 P3; bottom row waste, two blank slots, final 96 deep well
janusDeck.matchByNameNote: JANUS software matches plates by name; deck slot positions shown here are the conventional layout.
janusDeck.title: JANUS Deck Layout

wellLayoutDialog.title: Confirm well–sample layout
wellLayoutDialog.description: Review the auto-generated well–sample mapping from the KURO expected_mutations xlsx. Edit any sample name before confirming.
wellLayoutDialog.hint: Confirm the well→sample mapping; WT control is the last well.
wellLayoutDialog.empty: No wells generated. Check that the expected_mutations xlsx is selected.

help.PASS: Observed amino-acid changes exactly match the expected design.
help.AMBIGUOUS: All expected mutations matched, plus an extra AA change within the indel window of an expected site. Still counts as detected/recovered.
help.MIXED: Within-well contamination: a substantial second allele in the consensus signal.
help.WRONG_AA: An expected site shows a different amino acid, an expected mutation is missing, or an unexpected extra change sits outside the window.
help.FRAMESHIFT: Two or more nucleotide indels within the frameshift window.
help.MANY: More observed AA changes than both the design and the many-mutation cutoff.
help.LOWDEPTH: Too few reads to call this well reliably.
help.NO_CALL: Consensus has too many ambiguous (N) positions to trust the amino-acid calls.

home.deleteConfirmDesc: The project files on disk will not be deleted. Only the entry in the recent list is removed.

exportPreview.title: Mapping File Preview
exportPreview.subtitle: Echo and Janus mapping files are independent Excel/CSV outputs.
exportPreview.empty: No mapping to preview. Design primers first.

parameterPanel.title: Parameters
parameterPanel.strategyHint_partial: Forward and reverse are independent with overlap upstream of the codon.
parameterPanel.strategyHint_full: Reverse = rc(forward). Single primer Tm and length apply to both.
parameterPanel.strategyHelp:
Partial (Gibson): overlap upstream of the codon; fwd and rev are independent.
Full (Q5 SDM): rev = rc(fwd); single primer covers the mutation.
parameterPanel.strategyOption_partial_title: Gibson assembly style. Forward and reverse primers are independent; overlap is placed upstream of the target codon. Standard for in-house SDM.
parameterPanel.strategyOption_full_title: NEB Q5 SDM kit style. Reverse primer = reverse-complement of forward; a single back-to-back primer pair covers the mutation site.
parameterPanel.polymeraseHelp:
Selects Tm calculation preset (extension Tm target + tolerance defaults).
Choose the polymerase used in your SDM reaction.
Use 'Custom Polymerase' to define your own extension Tm.
parameterPanel.codonHelp:
Min. changes: fewest nucleotide changes from wild-type codon (minimises synthesis cost).
Optimal: highest-frequency codon for the selected organism (maximises expression).
parameterPanel.codonOption_closest: Min. changes (fewest nt changes from WT)
parameterPanel.codonOption_closest_title: Pick the mutant codon with the fewest nucleotide changes from the wild-type codon. Minimises primer mismatch and synthesis cost.
parameterPanel.codonOption_optimal_title: Pick the highest-frequency codon for the selected organism's codon usage table. Maximises expression but may require more nt changes.
parameterPanel.mutationsHelp:
Number of mutation candidates to load/design.
For EVOLVEpro/Others mode, this is the candidate design count, not a guaranteed final order count.
Final downstream count is determined by included rows.
parameterPanel.tmPrimerTitle: Single Tm target. rev = rc(fwd), so both primers share Tm by construction.
parameterPanel.tmTolHelp: Allowed deviation from Tm targets. Cascade stages add delta on top. Recommended 2-5°C.
parameterPanel.gcHelp:
Recommended range: 40–60%.
Primers outside this range receive a penalty score.
Very low GC (<30%) or very high GC (>70%) reduces synthesis quality.
parameterPanel.gcRangeTitle: Recommended range: 40-60%. Primers outside this range receive a penalty.
parameterPanel.gcInvalidError: Min must be less than Max
parameterPanel.primerLenHelp:
KOD One PCR Master Mix
  Standard:     22–35 bp, Tm >63°C
  Long targets: 25–35 bp, Tm >65°C

Experimental (EGFP SDM, demo)
  Forward total: 19–38 bp (incl. overlap)
  Reverse total: 18–32 bp (incl. overlap)

KURO primer length = overlap + priming region
parameterPanel.primerLenSingleTitle: Single length range applies to both primers (rev = rc(fwd)).
parameterPanel.primerLenInvalidError: Min must be less than Max
parameterPanel.autoRescueTitle: When enabled, retries failed mutations through 4 (top-N) or 6 (pipeline) stages of relaxed parameters. When disabled, failed mutations remain as-is with no auto-retry.
parameterPanel.seedTitle: Optional integer seed. Will be passed to the backend and recorded in run manifests once manifest wiring is complete (backend integration pending).
parameterPanel.tmPrimerHelp: Target Tm (°C) for symmetric full-overlap primers. Default 62.
parameterPanel.tmFwdHelp: Target Tm (°C) for forward primer in partial-overlap mode. Lower value increases mismatch tolerance.
parameterPanel.tmRevHelp: Target Tm (°C) for reverse primer. Should approximate tmFwd for balanced PCR.
parameterPanel.tmOverlapHelp: Target Tm (°C) of the overlap region between two primers.
parameterPanel.gcRangeHelp: Accepted GC content range (%) for primer regions. Recommended 40-60.
parameterPanel.primerLenLimitHelp: Toggle to bound primer length. When off, engine uses Tm-only optimization.
parameterPanel.primerLenFwdHelp: Forward primer length range (nt). Default 17-39 covers most SDM cases.
parameterPanel.autoRescueHelp: Auto-fill failed mutations with relaxed constraints in a second pass.
parameterPanel.seedHelp: Random seed for reproducible primer ranking. Leave empty for auto (time-based).
parameterPanel.tmSectionHelp: Melting temperature targets define how the engine balances primer stability and selectivity.

diversitySections.linkerHelp: Choose whether non-domain residues only backfill spare slots, get their own quota bin, or are excluded from Step 2 entirely.
diversitySections.helpTip3D: Selects variants spread apart in 3D space using AlphaFold Cα coordinates.
diversitySections.helpTip1D: Greedy Pareto selection that maximises minimum sequence-distance between chosen positions.
diversitySections.roundHelp:
Round × size = cumulative data points used to estimate model quality (ρ).
Lower ρ → wider pool and higher entropy weight for exploration.
diversitySections.positionCapHelp: Max substitutions per residue. Cap=1 keeps one best variant per position. Uses Grantham-distance tie-break when scores are within 2%.
diversitySections.domainStrategyHelp: Proportional: quota proportional to domain length. Equal: same quota per domain.
diversitySections.distanceHelp: Auto uses AlphaFold Cα when structure is loaded. Force 1D/3D for controlled comparisons.
diversitySections.poolKTitle: Manual pool size override (ignored when Round > 0)
diversitySections.poolKHelp:
Manual pool multiplier. Ignored when EVOLVEpro Round ≥ 1 (σ-adaptive mode).
Auto K = {{autoK}} based on current round.
diversitySections.entropyGuidedHelp: Positions where EVOLVEpro scores multiple substitutions similarly get an uncertainty bonus. Auto weight = {{autoEntropy}} based on current round.
diversitySections.entropyWeightTitle: Manual entropy weight override (ignored when Round > 0)
diversitySections.randomSeedHelp: Leave blank for fresh randomness. Set a seed to reproduce random baseline comparisons exactly.
diversitySections.evolveproRoundHelp: EVOLVEpro round number for adaptive primer selection.
diversitySections.roundSizeHelp: Number of primers per round (1-960). Multiples of 96 align with plate capacity.
diversitySections.overlapHelp: Domain overlap policy when adjacent domains share residues.
diversitySections.minQuotaHelp: Minimum primer quota per domain (0-20). Ensures each domain represented.
diversitySections.poolKLabelHelp: Pool-K diversity weighting target. Auto value derived from sequence properties.
diversitySections.entropyWeightHelp: Weight (0-1) for entropy-guided primer selection vs pure diversity.
diversitySections.autoRedesignOnLoadHelp: Re-run primer design automatically when a workspace is loaded.
diversitySections.savePipelineCacheHelp: Save intermediate pipeline outputs to disk for faster re-runs.
diversitySections.topPercentileHelp: Benchmark top percentile (1-100) cutoff for primer scoring.
diversitySections.randomTrialsHelp: Number of random baseline trials for benchmark (1-1000). Higher value yields more reliable estimate.
diversitySections.benchmarkRandomSeedHelp: Random seed for benchmark reproducibility. Empty value defaults to auto.
diversitySections.linkerLabelHelp: How to treat known linker regions during primer search.
diversitySections.positionCapLabelHelp: Maximum primers per residue position (1-20). Caps over-representation.
diversitySections.roundSectionHelp: EVOLVEpro round controls iterative primer batches with adaptive selection.
diversitySections.benchmarkSectionHelp: Benchmark compares designed primers against random baselines to estimate quality lift.

candidatePopover.backendUnavailable: Backend alternatives are unavailable until you re-design this workspace. Manual primer evaluation still works.
candidatePopover.rankedByPenalty: Ranked by penalty (lower = better). #1 is auto-selected as default.
candidatePopover.colPenTitle: Penalty = Tm deviation + GC deviation + codon changes + hairpin/homodimer

manifestDiff.title: Compare run manifests
manifestDiff.descriptionChanged: {{count}} item(s) differ between the two manifests.

failedMutationPopover.suggestionTip: Suggestion uses median Tm ({{tmFwd}}/{{tmRev}}/{{tmOv}}°C) and observed GC/length ranges from {{count}} successful primers, with tol ±{{tolMax}}°C.
failedMutationPopover.errorNoCandidates: No candidates found with these parameters

logPanel.titleTooltip: Sidecar progress log. Drag to move.
logPanel.copyAriaLabel: Copy all log messages to clipboard

reRunManifest.title: Confirm re-run
reRunManifest.description: Reproduce the same job from the saved manifest.
reRunManifest.warningBody: Identical output is not guaranteed. Do you want to continue?
reRunManifest.exportOnlyNotice: This manifest is an export-only operation and cannot be re-run directly. Re-export from the original data.

polymeraseEditor.title: Custom Polymerase
polymeraseEditor.description: Primer design defaults and asymmetric Tm targets for KURO.
polymeraseEditor.tmMethodOption_santalucia_title: SantaLucia 1998 nearest-neighbour parameters. Modern default; accurate for most PCR primers (DNA/DNA, 25-mers, physiological salt).
polymeraseEditor.tmMethodOption_breslauer_title: Breslauer 1986 nearest-neighbour parameters. Legacy table; tends to overestimate Tm vs SantaLucia by 1-3 °C.
polymeraseEditor.saltOption_owczarzy_title: Owczarzy 2004/2008 monovalent + Mg²⁺ correction. Recommended when Mg²⁺ or dNTP concentrations are non-standard.
polymeraseEditor.saltOption_santalucia_title: SantaLucia 1996 monovalent-only correction. Suitable for standard buffers without Mg²⁺ adjustment.
polymeraseEditor.saltOption_schildkraut_title: Schildkraut-Lifson 1965 empirical Na⁺ correction. Legacy; coarser than Owczarzy or SantaLucia.

autosave.failedWarning: Autosave failed 3 times. Check disk space or permissions.
autosave.autosaveIntro: Autosave is on for this project.

memory.blockDesc: Sidecar process memory reached {{pct}}% ({{rss}} MB). Stop any running jobs and restart the app.

mainShell.autosaveFailedStreak: Autosave failed 3 times. Check disk space or permissions.
mainShell.autosaveIsOn: Autosave is on for this project.
mainShell.memoryBlockDesc: The sidecar process memory usage has reached {{ratio}}% ({{rss}} MB). Stop current work and restart the app.

onboarding.descChange: Pick a new default folder. Existing projects stay where they are.
onboarding.descNew: Choose a default folder for projects. kuma keeps every Kuro design and Mame verdict run inside its own project folder so the work survives across weeks-long sequencing turnaround.
onboarding.kuroDesc: Kernel for Upstream Recombination Oligodesign. Batch SDM primer design from Gibson Assembly templates.
onboarding.mameDesc: Mutagenesis Assessment & Microplate Export. Oxford Nanopore NGS verdict.
onboarding.autosaveNote: Inputs and parameters autosave per project. Nothing leaks between projects.
onboarding.descStart: Choose a default folder for projects. kuma keeps every Kuro design and Mame verdict run inside its own project folder so the work survives across weeks-long sequencing turnaround.

appLayout.clearAllDesc: All design results will be lost. Continue?
appLayout.cannotRunDesc: Fill in the following before running design:
appLayout.missingMutations: Mutations (enter at least one mutation in the Mutation panel)
appLayout.missingTargetGene: Target gene (select one in the Sequence panel)
appLayout.deadlockDesc: No progress update for {{seconds}}+ seconds. The job is stuck.

overwriteConfirm.title: File already exists
overwriteConfirm.description: already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?

plateMap.platePairDesc: Each page shows one forward plate and its deduplicated reverse partner.
plateMap.exportAllTitle: Open a project first to use Export All.
plateMap.noPlateLayoutDesc: Run design to assign primers to plate wells.

jobQueue.dragTitle: Background job queue. Drag to move.

sequenceInput.targetGeneTitle: CDS region to design primers for. Auto-selected by longest coding sequence.
sequenceInput.organismTitle: Organism codon usage table for mutant codon selection.
sequenceInput.uniprotBlastInProgress: UniProt BLAST search in progress… (Step 2 available after)
sequenceInput.ecoliTitle: Escherichia coli K-12 codon usage table. Use when expressing in E. coli BL21, DH5α, K-12 derivatives.
sequenceInput.bsubtilisTitle: Bacillus subtilis 168 codon usage table. Use when expressing in B. subtilis or related Gram-positive hosts.
sequenceInput.scerevisiaeTitle: Saccharomyces cerevisiae codon usage table. Use when expressing in budding yeast hosts.
sequenceInput.sequenceFileHelp: Reference sequence file (.fasta/.gb) used as template for primer design.

mutationInput.topNZeroHint: Set top-N to 0 to load every variant from CSV
mutationInput.mutationsHelp: Mutations in HGVS or plain format (e.g. A123V, L45*). One per line or comma-separated.
mutationInput.othersPreviewEmpty: No preview available. Load a file first.
mutationInput.extraExposedAriaLabel: Number of extra unselected candidates to display

uniprotSearch.autoSearchTitle: Search UniProt using gene info from the loaded sequence file

designing.title: Design in progress
designing.description: Primer design is running. Closing now will cancel the job.

analyzing.title: Analysis in progress
analyzing.description: Sequencing data analysis is running. Closing now will cancel the job.

exporting.title: Export in progress
exporting.description: Files are being saved. Closing now may corrupt or discard the output.
exporting.forceCloseWarning: Force-closing during export may corrupt the output file.

networkConsent.title: External database consent
networkConsent.description: This feature calls the following external services. Your sequence data will be sent to those services.
networkConsent.persistNote: Consent persists after restart. You can block external calls at any time by enabling offline mode in Settings.

menuBar.restartSidecarBusyConfirm: A job is running. Restart sidecar anyway?
menuBar.offlineModeDesc: When on, all external service calls are blocked

run.sidecarHealthDead: sidecar not responding. Use Restart Sidecar
run.title: Run

panel.errorDescription: An error occurred while rendering the component.

handoffButton.label: Start Round {{n}}
handoffButton.disabledTitle: Merge activity data with genotype first to enable handoff

mameParameters.minFilteredDepthHelp: Cutoff based on the number of reads that passed the length-window filter. A more direct depth indicator than FASTA file size, although the current verdict backend still receives a legacy KB cutoff.
mameParameters.minFilteredDepthAria: Minimum filtered depth (reads). Length-window-filtered read count. ONT R10.4.1 consensus reaches Q35+ around 15× depth.
mameParameters.minFilteredDepthFootnote: Length-window-filtered read count. ONT R10.4.1 consensus: Q35+ ~15×. Not auto-converted 1:1 with the KB cutoff.
mameParameters.minFilteredDepthTitle: Length-window-filtered read count. ONT R10.4.1 consensus reaches Q35+ around 15× depth.
mameParameters.legacyKbHelp: Legacy cutoff using FASTA file size as a proxy for read depth. The KB value can vary for the same read count depending on read length, header length, line wrapping, and the consensus/intermediate output format, so it cannot be auto-synced with Filtered Depth.
mameParameters.legacyKbTooltip: File-size-based proxy cutoff. Affected by compression ratio, length distribution, and library variation. Reference only.

runManifest.invalidStructure: Invalid manifest structure. Required fields may be missing: {{path}}
runManifest.unsupportedSchema: Unsupported manifest schema_version: "{{version}}". Current supported version: "{{supported}}". Update kuma, or check whether the manifest was generated by an older version.

reRun.noRoundId: manifest.params.round_id is missing. Select a round in the mame tab before re-running.
reRun.exportNotRunnable: "{{method}}" is an export job. Export manifests cannot be re-run directly. Export again from the source data.

inputThresholds.kuroLargeBlock: Input is very large (mutations: {{rowCount}} rows{{fastaWarning}}). {{estimate}} (estimate). Continuing may result in very long run times.
inputThresholds.mameLargeBlock: Active data is very large ({{rowCount}} rows). {{estimate}} (estimate). Continuing may result in very long run times.

exportSlice.legacyWorkspaceUnsupported: Workspaces older than v0.3 are not supported. Start a new workspace.

benchmarkDialog.title: Benchmark
benchmarkDialog.blueBarLegend: Blue bar: absolute value percentile within this benchmark run.

sequenceViewer.title: Sequence Map
sequenceViewer.titleHint: Linear CDS map showing mutation positions. Green=designed, Red=failed. Density histogram below shows clustering — spread-out mutations are better for library diversity
sequenceViewer.emptyDesc: Load a target gene to view the mutation map.
sequenceViewer.svgAriaLabel: Linear sequence map: {{maxAa}} amino acids, {{count}} mutations

workspaceMigrate.title: Workspace Version Mismatch
workspaceMigrate.description: The selected workspace uses schema version {{from}}, but the current app requires {{to}}.
workspaceMigrate.noPathAlert: No automatic migration is defined for this version pair. Manual upgrade is required. The workspace cannot be loaded.
workspaceMigrate.backupNote: The original file is preserved as a backup. Migration cannot be undone automatically. Restore the backup manually if needed.
workspaceMigrate.migrateAriaLabel: Backup original file and migrate workspace
workspaceMigrate.noMigrationPath: No migration path defined for workspace {{from}} to {{to}}. Manual upgrade required.

wtWellGrid.heading: WT-well annotation
wtWellGrid.description: Designate wild-type wells used for normalisation. Click a well to toggle.
wtWellGrid.noActiveRound: Activate a round to designate WT wells.

preflight.descErrors: The following issues must be resolved before running.
preflight.errSidecarNotReady: Sidecar is not ready (status: {{status}}). Restart the app or use the Retry button in the status bar.
preflight.warnDiskUnavailable: Disk space check is unavailable on this platform. Ensure sufficient free space before running.
preflight.errNoNetwork: No network connection detected. This run requires internet access (e.g. UniProt/BLAST).

mappingExportDialog.descriptionFiles: Two files are written to the same path.
mappingExportDialog.bomCheckboxAriaLabel: Add UTF-8 BOM for Excel compatibility

resultTable.allFailedDesc: Review failure reasons below, then adjust parameters and retry.
resultTable.noResultsDesc: Load a sequence, define mutations, then run design.
resultTable.includeTitle: Include this row in plate map and exports
resultTable.excludeTitle: Exclude this row from plate map and exports
resultTable.pipelineFillHint: Pipeline + Fill on failure already substituted these positions; retry is disabled.
resultTable.pipelineFillNote: Pipeline + Fill on failure substituted these positions; retry is unnecessary.
resultTable.removeCustomRescueTitle: Remove custom rescue: restore to Failed

clearConfirmDialog.title: Clear All
clearConfirmDialog.description: All analysis results will be lost. Continue?

roundSummarySignals.calibrationBannerBody: Signal values are displayed for monitoring only. Automated classification decisions are not shown until advisory mode is enabled (Round 3+, v0.3).
roundSummarySignals.demoModeAriaLabel: Demo mode: metrics are synthesised from local merge stats, not a live backend RPC
roundSummarySignals.noMetricsYet: No round metrics yet — complete an ALE round to compute signals.
roundSummarySignals.rationaleAnchorInfer: Reasoning-based signal (not directly formalised in MLDE literature).

updater.notConfigured: Updater is not configured for this build. See RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md for key generation steps.

autosaveHydration.corrupted: Autosave file was corrupted. A backup was kept as {{filename}}
autosaveHydration.schemaTooNew: Autosave is from a newer kuma version. Skipping restore.

all.heading: Export Package
all.orderVendorHint: Included in Export all as a timestamp-prefixed Macrogen .xls file.
all.purificationTooltip: MOPC (Macrogen Oligo Purification Cartridge): Macrogen's standard purification method, not changeable.
all.projectNameHint: Used as the export folder and file prefix. Leave empty to auto-name kuro_YYMMDD_HHMM.

error.projectNameRegex: Use up to 40 letters, numbers, Korean characters, underscores, or hyphens.

error.plateNameRegex: Use 1-20 letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.

design.load: Upload an EVOLVEpro CSV or paste a protein sequence.
design.params: Set primer design parameters and run.
design.submit: Select variant pool filters, then run primer design.

export.all: Export Macrogen-compatible plate XLS plus FASTA, Echo CSV, JANUS CSV, and a plate map XLSX in one batch.

output.summary: Review design results, statistics, and plate layout.

activity.ingest: Ingest activity data, merge replicates, and build the EVOLVEpro input file.
activity.mergeExport: Merge activity data with genotype calls and export the merged table, then build the EVOLVEpro input by combining single-replicate (GC) and triple-replicate (WT-relative) activity.

analyze.inputs: Set the input directory and analysis parameters, then run.
analyze.review: Review the verdict table, plate layout, and per-plate verdict distribution in one view.
analyze.plate: Inspect the plate layout with barcode and variant assignments, and per-plate health indicators.
analyze.verdict: Review per-well pass/fail verdicts, summary statistics, and sequencing throughput metrics.

setup.design: Configure primer design parameters and generate the barcode package.
setup.files: Provide the CDS sequence and barcode seeds, set primer design parameters, choose an output folder, and generate the barcode package.

load.intentCallout: Design intent: Load the MAME export CSV as the variant source. Verify column mapping before advancing.
load.sideCardBody: MAME round 3 export detected. Use it as the CSV source or replace manually.

nominate.calloutText: Select a variant row to inspect details. Blocked variants are excluded from primer design.
nominate.sideCardBody: Review scored variants. Block low-confidence hits before advancing to Parameters.

params.calloutText: Expected counts update live as parameters change. Runtime estimate is approximate.
params.sideCardBody: Adjust Tm target and overlap to minimise warnings before submitting.

submit.contractCallout: Data contract: sidecar writes partial JSONL on cancel. Reload from autosave if browser tab closes.
submit.sideCardBody: Do not hide progress. Run screen must include cancel, ETA, partial save, and deadlock recovery.

output.sideCardBody: Review primer pairs. Use the Plate Map to spot coverage gaps before exporting.

export.handoffCallout: Implementation: MAME will read this export as its KURO artifact source in the next round.
export.sideCardBody: Confirm export targets. The MAME handoff bundle is generated automatically.

inspector.selectRowPrompt: Select a row to view details

report.empty: Run Design first — the report will appear here

validationDialog.description: Please complete the following before continuing.
validationDialog.title: Missing information

missing.fwdPlateName: Forward primer plate name is required
missing.fwdPlateNameInvalid: Forward primer plate name: use 1-20 letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens
missing.rvsPlateName: Reverse primer plate name is required
missing.rvsPlateNameInvalid: Reverse primer plate name: use 1-20 letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens
missing.geneCoordinates: Gene start and end coordinates are required
missing.geneRangeInvalid: Gene end must be greater than gene start
missing.projectPath: Open or create a project first

report.noResultsDesc: Run Design first to see primer results here.

methodNotFound.kuro: KURO sidecar is outdated (missing method: {{method}}). Run `pnpm run sidecar:build` and retry.
methodNotFound.mame: MAME sidecar is outdated (missing method: {{method}}). Run `pnpm run sidecar:build` and retry.

sequence.fastaNotSupported: CDS annotation required. Use a GenBank (.gb/.gbk) or SnapGene (.dna) file.

advisoryDecision.heading: Advisory Classification
advisoryDecision.readOnlyAriaLabel: Read-only advisory: no confirmation or persistence
advisoryDecision.addFilesAriaLabel: Add round result xlsx files (Variant + activity fold-change columns required)
advisoryDecision.classifyAriaLabel: Run advisory classification using the selected round files
advisoryDecision.deferredBootstrapInputsMissing: Switch decision deferred: confident double-transition classification requires WT replicate measurements from at least 4 replicates per round (not yet provided).
advisoryDecision.deferredCalibrationPeriod: Fewer than 3 rounds available: calibration period, classification deferred.
advisoryDecision.deferredInsufficientData: Insufficient data across rounds to classify with confidence.
advisoryDecision.deferredMixedSignals: Mixed signals detected across rounds: classification deferred.
